title: Zombadings 1: Patayin sa shokot si Remington
original_title: Zombadings 1: Patayin sa Shokot si Remington
overview: A boy cursed to turn gay when he grows up must sort out his feelings for the girl he loves and the boy – his best friend – he is suddenly lusting after, come to terms with his homophobia, and escape a pscho gay killer on the loose.
